75598.subject: 99 exploits. The most hacked quarter in DeFi history.
75598.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c2549d42-c592-4e6b-82e8-409bebea29d3/Top_banner.jpg?t=1783431744) [Brought to you by Boardwalk]
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/research/report/boardwalk-closing-the-gap-between-token-launches-token-economies)
Caption: 



Welcome to the DefiLlama Newsletter. Each week we bring you the most valuable onchain insights from the the deepest DeFi dataset in the world.



Subscribe (https://newsletter.defillama.com)



## Q2 2026: most-hacked quarter on record

Q2 2026 saw more hacks than any quarter on record with 99 hacks in the DefiLlama database.

Q1 2025 holds the “value stolen” record, but 2026 has seen over 140 exploits so far, combining for over $1b in value stolen.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/92aebd94-bd67-494a-9c79-a7de4aa3c5ef/quarterly-crypto-hacks-incident-count-vs-value-stolen_2026-07-07.png?t=1783431632)
Caption: 

April, May and June all saw 30+ exploits, and after BonkDAO’s [malicious governance proposal](https://x.com/bonk_inu/status/2074191403781906800) resulting in a $20m token drain, July isn’t off to a great start either.

Protocol logic exploits were by far the most common attack, but they were smaller on average than infrastructure failures. Drift’s admin key attack and Kelp’s LayerZero bridge exploit represent over 80% of value stolen this quarter.

39 of these hacks happened on Ethereum. The large value stolen totals on Arbitrum and Solana are mostly the result of fewer, larger hacks.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7b5c127a-f146-4a32-834b-c57852f1f252/q2-2026-crypto-hacks-stolen-value-by-chain-top-10_2026-07-06.png?t=1783357694)
Caption: A single hack can tag multiple chains. Kelp, for example, tagged both Arbitrum and Ethereum. 98% of Arbitrum’s stolen value came from one incident (Kelp); 99.5% of Solana’s came from Drift

Zooming out across all hacks in DefiLlama’s database going back to 2016, private key compromises are responsible for 44% of total value stolen. 16 of Q2’s 99 incidents and 45% of dollar losses trace back to some form of key or access-control compromise.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/54d18331-96bc-4456-be2a-58d2dea6f6b4/total-value-hacked_2026-07-06.png?t=1783364181)
Caption: 

Key management is still one of the biggest preventable risks for protocols. While DeFi users need to remember that “Audited” does not mean “Guaranteed Safe”, enabling multi-party computation, hardware-backed signing and eliminating single-attestor verification are legitimate and available risk mitigators for teams.

## How do hacks impact protocols?

Across hacks with us

75596.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 7
75596.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-7-cryptobeholder-uvfhf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BPAy12v2ISDe7b%2Bt8ayQ5ww%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3SZ88_rl1Nzsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mraurnem~9s-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mraurnem-9s
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Bitcoin holds near $63K on thin summer liquidity as ETF demand stays soft, but the bigger story is convergence — exchanges and asset managers are racing to bolt crypto onto traditional finance while Washington and Brussels reshape the rulebook. 🇬🇧 Coinbase Wins UK License for Stocks and Derivatives The FCA authorized Coinbase to offer equities and derivatives alongside crypto in the UK, letting institutional traders access perpetual futures and retail users trade stocks — a major step toward its "everything exchange" ambitions. Read full story 🏛️ US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Delayed by Agency Dispute The Trump administration's plan for a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve — holding roughly 328,000 seized BTC worth about $25B — has stalled amid a turf fight between the Treasury and Commerce departments over which agency should oversee it. More details 🏦 Vanguard Opens Search for Digital Assets Leader The multi-trillion-dollar asset manager is hiring a head of digital assets to oversee tokenization, stablecoins and blockchain initiatives for its wealth clients — a notable pivot for a firm long resistant to crypto. Read more 🇪🇺 EU Parliament Adopts Digital Assets Stance Post-MiCA With MiCA's transition period now over, the European Parliament adopted a digital assets report calling for deeper assessment of DeFi, staking, crypto lending and NFTs — signaling the next phase of EU crypto regulation. See details 🚨 BonkDAO Treasury Hit by $20M Exploit The Solana memecoin BONK crashed more than 9% after reports of a $20 million BonkDAO treasury exploit rattled investor confidence, triggering a fresh wave of profit-taking across the token. Read full story 💸 Gemini Launches 0% Stock Trading in US Super-App Push Gemini rolled out commission-free stock trading for eligible US users as it moves to become an "all-in-one financial super app," widening the collision between crypto exchanges and traditional brokerages. More details 💰 EDX Markets Raises $76M in Round Led by SBI Holdings Institutional crypto exchange EDX Markets closed a $76 million Series C led by SBI Holdings, doubling down on a model that separates trading from custody through a central clearinghouse to minimize counterparty risk. Read more 📬 Subscribe for tomorrow's AI-curated brief — more news at cryptobeholder.com
Продовжити читати на Linked

75594.subject: Crypto outperforms equities
75594.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $63,748 (2.3%) | **ETH** $1,792 (1.8%) | **SOL** $82 (1.5%)

* SpaceX joins the [Nasdaq 100](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2074466777287778698?s=20)

* ZCash’s new [Ironwood pool](https://x.com/TachyonZcash/status/2074453838510379410?s=20) is going through formal verification

* Arcus DEX (formerly dYdX) on the Robinhood blockchain opens their [wait list](https://waitlist.arcus.xyz/s/RCIV)

* Bonk treasury has [$21.2M stolen](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2074325873503986103?s=20) due to rogue DAO proposal

* Bitcoin ETFs see [$266M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2074350038525088195?s=20) in net inflows

* [Iran attacks 3 ships](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2074514762960920684?s=20) in the Strait of Hormuz

* Microsoft [cuts 4800 jobs](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2074124298596307037?s=20) across sales and Xbox divisions

* Hyperliquid total open positions hit [new ATH](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2074083095163093338?s=20)

* China considers [restricting](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2074440649110159822?s=20) top AI models from overseas access

* TeraWulf signs [$19B dea](https://x.com/tokens/status/2074126230203646192?s=20)l with Anthropic for AI infrastructure campus in Kentucky

* Trump says that [Bitcoin](https://x.com/TreeNewsFeed/status/2074137670716932123?s=20) could go into Trump Accounts

* Chinese startup Deep Seek is developing their [own chip](https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2074492384726159725?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/crypto-outperforms-equities

75589.subject: A Robinhood Chain winner
75589.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Hi all, happy Tuesday! 

A brutal June gave way to a green Monday, and for and tokens led: Solana Eco (+6.0%), lending and ETH-beta swept the board while BTC lagged at +0.8%. We cover the rotation, then a $20 million governance attack that drained BonkDAO's treasury through its own voting system, then dig into Robinhood Chain, where the obvious winner is LIT but the quieter one may be USDG, already the ecosystem's top stablecoin with Maple, Morpho and Spark building around it.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Monday was a risk-on session that finally favored the beaten-down token complex over BTC. Solana Eco (+6.0%), Lending (+5.5%), Ethereum Eco (+5.3%), and the two crypto-equity cohorts (2025 Crypto Equity Cohort +5.0%, Crypto Equities +4.6%) swept the top of the cross-sector board, while BTC lagged the move at +0.8% and equities posted smaller gains (S&P 500 +0.3%, Nasdaq 100 -0.3%). It was an ETH-beta, DeFi-lending and listed-crypto-proxy tape with BTC light.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/a77c97ce-8f9c-4e31-9b4c-9eebd16c6b97/image.png?t=1783432100)
Caption: 

June was [the worst stretch](https://app.blockworksresearch.com/flashnotes/bitcoin-june-2026-update) of the year for US spot bitcoin ETFs, which bled a record ~$4.5B for the month, and BTC fell below $58,000 on July 1 — a 21-month low — before rebounding. The first crack came on July 2-3, when the ETFs snapped a 10-day, ~$2.7B outflow streak with $221.7M of inflows, their strongest day in two months, as bitcoin reclaimed the $61,000 level. Monday reads as an oversold bounce off that tentative bottom, concentrated in the deepest-retraced alt sectors, rather than a response to any fresh same-day catalyst. The majors themselves barely moved — BTC around $62-63K, ETH near $1,760, and SOL near $80 in spot terms — so the sector-index gains are a rotation story, not an L1-price story.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/411c6b76-3cab-46f8-8618-8076431ebe9b/image.png?t=1783431988)
Caption: 

The Solana Eco led the board even as its best-known constituent sold off, and interesting sub-plot atop the days story: BONK fell sharply (roughly 10% on our component board) after BonkDAO disclosed that attackers [drained](https://x.com/r0bre/status/2074213613745717511) an estimated $20M in BONK from its treasury through a malicious governance proposal.
